meta.title: OurCandle4U — Handmade candles & car rental
meta.description: Enjoyed your GoMore rental? 🕯️ Want to keep the handmade candle? Make a contribution via TWINT toward our dream trip to Japan 🇯🇵

hero.title: Thanks for renting with us! 🚗✨
hero.subtitle: 🕯️ We left you a handmade candle — a small thank-you from Gabriele & Angelika, your GoMore hosts 💛
hero.altHosts: Gabriele and Angelika, your GoMore hosts

story.title: 🕯️ Why a candle?
story.altTravel: Gabriele and Angelika on a trip — dreaming of Japan
story.paragraph1: 🚗 We share our cars on GoMore and love keeping them spotless for every trip. As a thank-you, we leave a handmade candle in each car — yours to keep if you'd like it! 🕯️
story.paragraph2: 🇯🇵 We're saving up for a dream trip to Japan. If you want the candle, a TWINT contribution helps us get one step closer — you decide the amount! 🙌
story.paragraph3: ✨ If you want to keep the candle, please make a contribution via TWINT — you decide the amount. Every contribution goes straight toward our Japan adventure — thank you for supporting us! 🥰

candle.title: 🕯️ Your handmade candle
candle.description: Each candle is made by hand with care 🤲 If you want to keep it, please make a contribution via TWINT — you decide the amount. More colors and scents are also available on request 🎨
candle.colorsNote: 🎨 Ask us about other colors and special requests!
candle.altCouple: Gabriele and Angelika dreaming of Japan

twint.title: 🇯🇵 Contribute via TWINT
twint.description: 🕯️ If you want to keep the candle, please make a contribution via TWINT — you decide the amount 💛

contact.title: 🕯️ Want more candles?
contact.description: Love your candle and want more colors or a custom order? 💌 Message us — we'd love to hear from you!
contact.whatsappHint: Opens WhatsApp to send us a message 📲
contact.gomoreHint: Opens the GoMore app to your booking — message us in the chat 💬
